creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213268
py-django-crispy-forms-1.9.0.patch

Hi Sunpoet,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-crispy-forms to 1.9.0 and assigns it to Django 2.2.

The patch also marks www/py-dj22-django-crispy-forms as DEPRECATED because that package will be obsolete then and updates the CONFLICTS_INSTALL entries of both ports.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py35, py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
